description: Operational metadata, data health, and incidents for the Open DataOps Platform.

targets.rawSql: SELECT dag_id AS "DAG", airflow_run_id AS "Run", run_status AS "Status", started_at AS "Started", completed_at AS "Completed", CASE WHEN completed_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at)) END AS "Duration seconds" FROM metadata.pipeline_runs WHERE (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Open incidents" FROM metadata.data_incidents WHERE incident_status = 'OPEN' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring});

SELECT severity AS "Severity", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Count" FROM metadata.data_incidents WHERE incident_status = 'OPEN' AND severity ~ '^(${severity:regex})$' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) GROUP BY severity ORDER BY severity;

SELECT incident_type AS "Incident type", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Count" FROM metadata.data_incidents WHERE incident_status = 'OPEN' AND incident_type ~ '^(${incident_type:regex})$' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) GROUP BY incident_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT detected_at AS "Detected", severity AS "Severity", incident_type AS "Incident type", table_schema AS "Schema", table_name AS "Table", COALESCE(column_name, '') AS "Column", incident_message AS "Message", incident_status AS "Status" FROM metadata.data_incidents WHERE table_schema ~ '^(${schema:regex})$' AND table_name ~ '^(${table:regex})$' AND incident_type ~ '^(${incident_type:regex})$' AND severity ~ '^(${severity:regex})$' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 200;

SELECT measured_at AS "time", row_count::double precision AS "value", table_schema || '.' || table_name AS "metric" FROM metadata.table_health_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) AND table_schema ~ '^(${schema:regex})$' AND table_name ~ '^(${table:regex})$' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY measured_at;

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (table_schema, table_name) pipeline_run_id, table_schema, table_name, freshness_column, max_freshness_value, measured_at FROM metadata.table_health_metrics WHERE table_schema ~ '^(${schema:regex})$' AND table_name ~ '^(${table:regex})$' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, measured_at DESC) SELECT latest.table_schema AS "Schema", latest.table_name AS "Table", latest.freshness_column AS "Freshness column", latest.max_freshness_value AS "Latest value", ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - latest.max_freshness_value)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS "Freshness age hours", CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM metadata.data_incidents incidents WHERE incidents.pipeline_run_id = latest.pipeline_run_id AND incidents.table_schema = latest.table_schema AND incidents.table_name = latest.table_name AND incidents.incident_type = 'STALE_DATA' AND incidents.incident_status = 'OPEN') THEN 'STALE' ELSE 'HEALTHY' END AS "State" FROM latest ORDER BY latest.table_schema, latest.table_name;

SELECT command_type || ' / ' || execution_status AS "Result", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Count" FROM metadata.dbt_node_results WHERE (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) GROUP BY command_type, execution_status ORDER BY command_type, execution_status;

SELECT node_name AS "Node", command_type AS "Command", execution_status AS "Status", ROUND(execution_time_seconds::numeric, 3) AS "Seconds" FROM metadata.dbt_node_results WHERE (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY execution_time_seconds DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT recorded_at AS "Recorded", node_name AS "Node", command_type AS "Command", execution_status AS "Status", COALESCE(message, '') AS "Message" FROM metadata.dbt_node_results WHERE LOWER(execution_status) NOT IN ('success', 'pass') AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Recent failed dbt nodes and tests

targets.rawSql: SELECT detected_at AS "Detected", incident_type AS "Change", table_schema AS "Schema", table_name AS "Table", COALESCE(column_name, '') AS "Column", COALESCE(expected_value, '') AS "Expected", COALESCE(observed_value, '') AS "Observed" FROM metadata.data_incidents WHERE incident_type IN ('COLUMN_ADDED', 'COLUMN_REMOVED', 'DATA_TYPE_CHANGED', 'NULLABILITY_CHANGED') AND table_schema ~ '^(${schema:regex})$' AND table_name ~ '^(${table:regex})$' AND (${pipeline_run:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline_run_id::text = ${pipeline_run:sqlstring}) ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 100;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT table_schema FROM metadata.table_health_metrics ORDER BY table_schema
list.label: Schema
list.name: schema
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT table_schema FROM metadata.table_health_metrics ORDER BY table_schema

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT table_name FROM metadata.table_health_metrics WHERE table_schema ~ '^(${schema:regex})$' ORDER BY table_name
list.label: Table
list.name: table
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT table_name FROM metadata.table_health_metrics WHERE table_schema ~ '^(${schema:regex})$' ORDER BY table_name

list.definition: SELECT airflow_run_id AS __text, pipeline_run_id::text AS __value FROM metadata.pipeline_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100
list.label: Pipeline run
list.name: pipeline_run
list.query: SELECT airflow_run_id AS __text, pipeline_run_id::text AS __value FROM metadata.pipeline_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100

title: Open DataOps Platform Health
